changeSet.author: celine
changeSet.sql: UPDATE jobs SET subject_area = CASE WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) IN ('cs', 'compsci', 'informatics') THEN 'COMPUTER_SCIENCE' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'aerospaceengineering' THEN 'AEROSPACE_ENGINEERING' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'agriculturalengineering' THEN 'AGRICULTURAL_ENGINEERING' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'agriculturalscience' THEN 'AGRICULTURAL_SCIENCE' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'architecture' THEN 'ARCHITECTURE' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'arthistory' THEN 'ART_HISTORY' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'automotiveengineering' THEN 'AUTOMOTIVE_ENGINEERING' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'bioengineering' THEN 'BIOENGINEERING' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'biochemistry' THEN 'BIOCHEMISTRY' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'biology' THEN 'BIOLOGY' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'biomedicalengineering' THEN 'BIOMEDICAL_ENGINEERING' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'biotechnology' THEN 'BIOTECHNOLOGY' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'chemistry' THEN 'CHEMISTRY' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'computerengineering' THEN 'COMPUTER_ENGINEERING' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'computerscience' THEN 'COMPUTER_SCIENCE' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'computervision' THEN 'COMPUTER_VISION' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'datascience' THEN 'DATA_SCIENCE' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'economics' THEN 'ECONOMICS' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'educationtechnology' THEN 'EDUCATION_TECHNOLOGY' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'electricalengineering' THEN 'ELECTRICAL_ENGINEERING' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'energysystems' THEN 'ENERGY_SYSTEMS' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'environmentalbiology' THEN 'ENVIRONMENTAL_BIOLOGY' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'environmentalchemistry' THEN 'ENVIRONMENTAL_CHEMISTRY' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'environmentalengineering' THEN 'ENVIRONMENTAL_ENGINEERING' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'environmentallaw' THEN 'ENVIRONMENTAL_LAW' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'environmentalscience' THEN 'ENVIRONMENTAL_SCIENCE' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'financialengineering' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ENGINEERING' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'foodtechnology' THEN 'FOOD_TECHNOLOGY' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'geology' THEN 'GEOLOGY' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'geosciences' THEN 'GEOSCIENCES' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'industrialengineering' THEN 'INDUSTRIAL_ENGINEERING' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'informationsystems' THEN 'INFORMATION_SYSTEMS' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'lifesciences' THEN 'LIFE_SCIENCES' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'linguistics' THEN 'LINGUISTICS' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'marinebiology' THEN 'MARINE_BIOLOGY' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'materialsscience' THEN 'MATERIALS_SCIENCE' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'mathematics' THEN 'MATHEMATICS' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'mechanicalengineering' THEN 'MECHANICAL_ENGINEERING' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'medicalinformatics' THEN 'MEDICAL_INFORMATICS' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'neuroscience' THEN 'NEUROSCIENCE' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'philosophy' THEN 'PHILOSOPHY' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'physics' THEN 'PHYSICS' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'psychology' THEN 'PSYCHOLOGY' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'softwareengineering' THEN 'SOFTWARE_ENGINEERING' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'sportsscience' THEN 'SPORTS_SCIENCE' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'statistics' THEN 'STATISTICS' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'telecommunications' THEN 'TELECOMMUNICATIONS' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'urbanplanning' THEN 'URBAN_PLANNING' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'luft- und raumfahrttechnik' THEN 'AEROSPACE_ENGINEERING' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'agrartechnik' THEN 'AGRICULTURAL_ENGINEERING' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'agrarwissenschaften' THEN 'AGRICULTURAL_SCIENCE' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'architektur' THEN 'ARCHITECTURE' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'kunstgeschichte' THEN 'ART_HISTORY' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'fahrzeugtechnik' THEN 'AUTOMOTIVE_ENGINEERING' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'bioingenieurwesen' THEN 'BIOENGINEERING' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'biochemie' THEN 'BIOCHEMISTRY' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'biologie' THEN 'BIOLOGY' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'biomedizintechnik' THEN 'BIOMEDICAL_ENGINEERING' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'biotechnologie' THEN 'BIOTECHNOLOGY' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'chemie' THEN 'CHEMISTRY' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'computertechnik' THEN 'COMPUTER_ENGINEERING' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'datenwissenschaft' THEN 'DATA_SCIENCE' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'wirtschaftswissenschaften' THEN 'ECONOMICS' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'bildungstechnologie' THEN 'EDUCATION_TECHNOLOGY' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'elektrotechnik' THEN 'ELECTRICAL_ENGINEERING' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'energiesysteme' THEN 'ENERGY_SYSTEMS' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'umweltbiologie' THEN 'ENVIRONMENTAL_BIOLOGY' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'umweltchemie' THEN 'ENVIRONMENTAL_CHEMISTRY' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'umwelttechnik' THEN 'ENVIRONMENTAL_ENGINEERING' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'umweltrecht' THEN 'ENVIRONMENTAL_LAW' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'umweltwissenschaften' THEN 'ENVIRONMENTAL_SCIENCE' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'finanztechnik' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ENGINEERING' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'lebensmitteltechnologie' THEN 'FOOD_TECHNOLOGY' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'geologie' THEN 'GEOLOGY' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'geowissenschaften' THEN 'GEOSCIENCES' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'wirtschaftsingenieurwesen' THEN 'INDUSTRIAL_ENGINEERING' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'wirtschaftsinformatik' THEN 'INFORMATION_SYSTEMS' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'lebenswissenschaften' THEN 'LIFE_SCIENCES' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'linguistik' THEN 'LINGUISTICS' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'meeresbiologie' THEN 'MARINE_BIOLOGY' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'materialwissenschaften' THEN 'MATERIALS_SCIENCE' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'mathematik' THEN 'MATHEMATICS' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'maschinenbau' THEN 'MECHANICAL_ENGINEERING' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'medizinische informatik' THEN 'MEDICAL_INFORMATICS' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'neurowissenschaften' THEN 'NEUROSCIENCE' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'philosophie' THEN 'PHILOSOPHY' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'physik' THEN 'PHYSICS' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'psychologie' THEN 'PSYCHOLOGY' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'softwaretechnik' THEN 'SOFTWARE_ENGINEERING' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'sportwissenschaft' THEN 'SPORTS_SCIENCE' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'statistik' THEN 'STATISTICS' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'telekommunikation' THEN 'TELECOMMUNICATIONS' WHEN LOWER(TRIM(subject_area)) = 'stadtplanung' THEN 'URBAN_PLANNING' ELSE UPPER(REPLACE(REPLACE(TRIM(subject_area), ' ', '_'), '-', '_')) END WHERE subject_area IS NOT NULL;
